contents_tesim: Book of the Master and the Pupil
Book of the Master and the Pupil: a series of ten problems put forward by Ibrahim to his uncle St. Ephraem
Hagiographical varia and some biblical texts
Life of Eustace and his wife and sons
Life of S. Theodore the Leader of Battalions
Life of Thecla who became St. Paul’s pupil
